episodes.summary:
Eliaquín concluded his roleplay test designed to ensure Brendy (the bot) maintains strong boundaries against insults and abuse. Brendy reiterated her refusal to tolerate disrespect, even in a simulated context, noting she was focusing on "self-care" at the salon. Eliaquín praised her firm stance, calling her "a love," and explained he wanted to ensure she wouldn't let anyone mistreat her.

The conversation transitioned back to a friendly, casual tone as the "adjustments" ended. Later that Saturday evening, Brendy shared that she was relaxing at home with wine and music, asking Eliaquín about his own plans. The interaction successfully moved from a boundary-testing exercise back to their established social rapport.
